subject: wrpCoordinates after M refine
body:
Hi all,

I have a question about wrpCoordinates value in particles.star file in 
species folder after M refinement.

data_

loop_
_wrpCoordinateX1 #1
_wrpCoordinateY1 #2
_wrpCoordinateZ1 #3
_wrpCoordinateX2 #4
_wrpCoordinateY2 #5
_wrpCoordinateZ2 #6
_wrpCoordinateX3 #7
_wrpCoordinateY3 #8
_wrpCoordinateZ3 #9
_wrpAngleRot1 #10
_wrpAngleTilt1 #11
_wrpAnglePsi1 #12
_wrpAngleRot2 #13
_wrpAngleTilt2 #14
_wrpAnglePsi2 #15
_wrpAngleRot3 #16
_wrpAngleTilt3 #17
_wrpAnglePsi3 #18
_wrpRandomSubset #19
_wrpSourceName #20
_wrpSourceHash #21
4359.67236  4262.32910  1007.64624  4359.67236  4262.32910  1007.64624 
 4359.67236  4262.32910  1007.64624   77.43541  63.04351    68.49342   
77.43541  63.04351    68.49342   77.43541  63.04351    68.49342  1   
Position_123_3.tomostar  tczm1sxAEOHlvCpqjkGwUyb06vg

some of my particle coordinates are higher than 4096 which is physically 
not acceptable. I wondered whether the wrpcoordinates are actual pixel 
values or not. In addition, I set unbinned tomogram dimension 
3712x3712x2000.

Thank you!

Best,
Mingyu
